Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xCB00 "CARRYONLAUGHING-CB00" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Carry on Laughing.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Removed an unnecessary copy of the BASIC ROM between $A000 and $BFFF in RAM before taking the dump.
